description: Make issues a gap-sibling first-class open-work kind: a task addresses an issue as it addresses a framework-gap; an open issue ranks and focuses in currentState as an open gap does; a completed task addressing an unresolved issue is invariant-flagged. Add the parity vocabulary in live .context config and the packaged catalog, plus two additive issue-schema fields. The deriver and lens-view are kind-general — change no deriver code. Preserve the divergences in criterion 7. Prerequisite for addressing issue-004 by a task.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
notes: Addresses FGAP-098. Prerequisite for addressing issue-004 by a task. Catalog back-port interacts with FGAP-094, TASK-066, TASK-067.
